title: Love the Way You Lie

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and watch me burn
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那看着我五脏如焚

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I like the way it hurts
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我喜欢这心痛的感觉

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and hear me cry
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那听着我哭泣

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我连你的谎言都爱,

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱

lyrics.text: I can't tell you what it really is
lyrics.translation: 我说不出来它到底是什么

lyrics.text: [Eminem]
I can only tell you what it feels like
lyrics.translation: 我只能告诉你它是一种什么感觉

lyrics.text: And right now it's a steel knife in my windpipe
lyrics.translation: 现在我的气管像被堵住一样

lyrics.text: I can't breathe but I still fight while I can fight
lyrics.translation: 无法呼吸 但是我仍在尽力坚持

lyrics.text: As long as the wrong feels right it's like I'm in flight
lyrics.translation: 就像被驾到高空一样没有任何感觉

lyrics.text: High off of love, drunk from my hate,
lyrics.translation: 借酒泄愤想要挣脱束缚

lyrics.text: It's like I'm huffing paint and I love it the more I suffer, I suffocate
lyrics.translation: 我就像这溺水一样，越是挣扎就越窒息

lyrics.text: And right before I'm about to drown, she resuscitates me
lyrics.translation: 就在我马上要沉下去的时候，她拯救了我

lyrics.text: She ******* hates me and I love it.
lyrics.translation: 我爱她恨我的感觉

lyrics.text: Wait! Where you going?
lyrics.translation: 等等！你要去哪儿？

lyrics.text: "I'm leaving you"
lyrics.translation: 我要离开你

lyrics.text: No you ain't. Come back we're running right back.
lyrics.translation: 不，你不能走。回来吧

lyrics.text: Here we go again
lyrics.translation: 我们重新来过！

lyrics.text: It's so insane cause when it's going good, it's going great
lyrics.translation: 这真是神奇，因为它向着完美发展

lyrics.text: I'm Superman with the wind at his back, she's Lois Lane
lyrics.translation: 我就像超人一样无往不利！ 她就是露易丝莱恩一般

lyrics.text: But when it's bad it's awful, I feel so ashamed I snapped
lyrics.translation: 糟糕的时候一塌糊涂我都感到羞耻

lyrics.text: Who's that dude? I don't even know his name
lyrics.translation: 这人又是谁？我连他名字都不知道

lyrics.text: I laid hands on her, I'll never stoop so low again
lyrics.translation: 我揍了她 ,告诉她我再也不会妥协了

lyrics.text: I guess I don't know my own strength
lyrics.translation: 连我自己都不知道我有多强硬

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and watch me burn
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那看着我五内如焚

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I like the way it hurts
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我喜欢这心痛的感觉

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and hear me cry
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那听着我哭泣

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我连你的谎言都爱,

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱

lyrics.text: [Eminem]
You ever love somebody so much you can barely breathe
lyrics.translation: 你曾经爱一个人爱到窒息么？

lyrics.text: When you're with 'em
lyrics.translation: 当你和他们在一起的时候

lyrics.text: You meet and neither one of you even knows what hit 'em
lyrics.translation: 你们满足了 而你们没一个人知道到底在干什么

lyrics.text: Got that warm fuzzy feeling
lyrics.translation: 慢慢享受你的暧昧感觉吧

lyrics.text: Yeah, them those chills you used to get 'em
lyrics.translation: 呵~那些你们曾经的欢乐时光

lyrics.text: Now you're getting ******* sick of looking at 'em
lyrics.translation: 现在你看对方一眼都感觉恶心

lyrics.text: You swore you'd never hit 'em; never do nothing to hurt 'em
lyrics.translation: 你发过誓再不做出任何伤害他的事情

lyrics.text: Now you're in each other's face spewing venom in your words when you spit them
lyrics.translation: 但是你现在却换了副嘴脸，恶语相加

lyrics.text: You push pull each other's hair, scratch claw hit 'em
lyrics.translation: 你现在却把他推来搡去，不停地伤害着他

lyrics.text: Throw 'em down pin 'em
lyrics.translation: 你在蹂躏着他，像用针一样刺痛他

lyrics.text: So lost in the moments when you're in them
lyrics.translation: 如此沉迷般的伤害着对方

lyrics.text: It's the rage that took over it controls you both
lyrics.translation: 这就如同一次比赛，但却是罪恶在掌控着你

lyrics.text: So they say you're best to go your separate ways
lyrics.translation: 它们告诉你分道扬镳是你最好的选择

lyrics.text: Guess if they don't know you 'cause today that was yesterday
lyrics.translation: 他们大概不知道今日是非是因昨日而起

lyrics.text: Yesterday is over, it's a different day
lyrics.translation: 如果以前的事没发生就不会这样

lyrics.text: Sound like broken records playing over but you promised her
lyrics.translation: 就像破唱片一样一遍又一遍的重复你对他的承诺

lyrics.text: Next time you show restraint
lyrics.translation: 下次你要克制自己

lyrics.text: You don't get another chance
lyrics.translation: 不然你们之间就没有机会了

lyrics.text: Life is no Nintendo game
lyrics.translation: 生活不是任天堂的游戏

lyrics.text: But you lied again
lyrics.translation: 然而你又食言了

lyrics.text: Now you get to watch her leave out the window
lyrics.translation: 现在你只能眼睁睁的丢掉她给你的最后一次机会

lyrics.text: I guess that's why they call it window pane
lyrics.translation: 我想这也就是所谓的遗憾吧 ？？

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and watch me burn
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那看着我五内如焚

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I like the way it hurts
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我喜欢这心痛的感觉

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and hear me cry
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那听着我哭泣

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我连你的谎言都爱,

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱

lyrics.text: [Eminem]
Now I know we said things, did things that we didn't mean
lyrics.translation: 现在我明白了他说的事与愿违、口是心非

lyrics.text: And we fall back into the same patterns, same routine
lyrics.translation: 我们又回到了原来的套路上

lyrics.text: But your temper's just as bad as mine is
lyrics.translation: 你脾气跟我一样坏

lyrics.text: You're the same as me
lyrics.translation: 你跟我一样

lyrics.text: But when it comes to love you're just as blinded
lyrics.translation: 但是每每当我们快修成正果时却总是错过

lyrics.text: Baby, please come back
lyrics.translation: 宝贝，回来吧。

lyrics.text: It wasn't you, baby it was me
lyrics.translation: 好吧，宝贝儿都是我的错

lyrics.text: Maybe our relationship isn't as crazy as it seems
lyrics.translation: 没准我们的关系并没有看上去那么不可救药

lyrics.text: Maybe that's what happens when a tornado meets a volcano
lyrics.translation: 也许我们就像是水火相容的结果

lyrics.text: All I know is I love you too much to walk away though
lyrics.translation: 我只知道我爱你爱得不能自拔

lyrics.text: Come inside, pick up your bags off the sidewalk
lyrics.translation: 回家吧，拿上你的东西回家吧

lyrics.text: Don't you hear sincerity in my voice when I talk
lyrics.translation: 难道你没有听出我声音中的真诚么

lyrics.text: I told you this is my fault
lyrics.translation: 我都说了，这都是我的错

lyrics.text: Look me in the eyeball
lyrics.translation: 过来看着我的眼睛

lyrics.text: Next time I'm pissed, I'll aim my fist at the drywall
lyrics.translation: 我绝不会再发火再动手了，决不会了

lyrics.text: Next time. There won't be no next time
lyrics.translation: 决不会了

lyrics.text: I apologize even though I know its lies
lyrics.translation: 我明知道我的道歉是谎话

lyrics.text: I'm tired of the games I just want her back
lyrics.translation: 我受够这场争执了，我只想让她回来

lyrics.text: I know I'm a liar
lyrics.translation: 我知道我就是个骗子

lyrics.text: If she ever tries to ******* leave again
lyrics.translation: 但是如果她再TM试图离开我的话

lyrics.text: Im'a tie her to the bed and set this house on fire
lyrics.translation: 我会把她绑在床上，点燃房子

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and watch me burn
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那看着我五内如焚

lyrics.text: that's alright
lyrics.translation: 我就这么打算

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I like the way it hurts
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我喜欢这心痛的感觉

lyrics.text: Just gonna stand there and hear me cry
lyrics.translation: 你是不是就打算站在那听着我哭泣

lyrics.text: But that's alright because I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 不过没关系,因为我连你的谎言都爱,

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱

lyrics.text: I love the way you lie
lyrics.translation: 连你的谎言都爱
